title: fix: update veo 3.1 fast model id to GA version
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Un-breaking the video machine
gist.blurb: Google graduated Veo 3.1 Fast out of preview, which temporarily confused our video pipeline. We've updated the model ID, so your video generations are back online and ready to roll!
gist.summary: Updated the Google Veo 3.1 Fast model ID to its General Availability version to resolve 404 errors caused by the retired preview alias.
gist.impact: Video generation using the Veo 3.1 Fast model is fully restored and functional again.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes a broken video generation model (Veo). Visual symbols: film reels, video cameras, fixing broken equipment. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. Scene: Polly fixing a retro video camera with a wrench, while the Monitor Robot looks excited.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a wrench to fix a glowing retro video camera. The chunky Monitor Robot stands nearby holding a strip of film, its square pixel eyes looking excited. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
